title: pieris japonica subsp. taiwanensis
intro: Pieris japonica subsp. taiwanensis, also known as Japanese andromeda or Taiwan andromeda, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Research has shown that the plant has various health benefits, such as reducing cholesterol levels and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Pieris japonica subsp. taiwanensis typically involve the use of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as a tea or used as an ingredient in traditional remedies.
